title: Sales Engineer | Front-End Semiconductor Specialist
description:
• Up to S$5,000 Basic + S$800 Car Allowance + Sales Incentives + AWS + Variable Bonus.

  • Tampines North (T-Space).

  • Monday – Friday | 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM.

  • Leading industry players including UMC, Micron, GlobalFoundries (GF), and STM.

  • 70% Farmer (Account Management) and 30% Hunter (New Business Development).

Join a high-growth technical sales team serving the core of Singapore's semiconductor hub. This role is designed for a technically savvy individual who understands the complexities of front-end semiconductor manufacturing. You will manage key accounts, bridging the gap between sophisticated technical requirements and commercial success while ensuring first-class customer satisfaction.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Implement tailored sales strategies to meet or exceed objectives for assigned major accounts.

  • Provide first-hand technical assistance and coordinate supplier resources to develop solutions that meet client specifications.

  • Maintain strong relationships with existing tier-1 clients (70%) while identifying new opportunities for growth (30%).

  • Ensure products are priced to meet target profit margins while maintaining competitive customer support.

  • Organize and conduct technical training seminars and presentations for customers when required.

  • Resolve daily customer concerns regarding product quality, availability, and delivery timelines.

  • Facilitate the resolution of accounts receivable issues to ensure company revenue targets are met.

Requirements:

  • Minimum NITEC qualification and above.

  • At least two years of direct experience working with front-end semiconductors.

  • Must possess a personal vehicle for client visits (Car allowance provided).

  • Ability to handle complex technical queries and translate them into actionable sales solutions.

  • Meticulous, proactive, and capable of working effectively with diverse technical suppliers.

Other Information:

  • Competitive commission structure and sales incentives on top of a high basic salary.

  • Performance-driven environment with guaranteed AWS and variable bonuses.

  • Modern office space located at T-Space in Tampines.

Please indicate the following information in your resume:

  • Current & Expected salary.

  • Notice period or availability to start.

  • Details of semiconductor accounts previously managed.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified. All applications will be treated with the strictest confidence.

postedCompany.description:
Recruit Now Singapore Pte Ltd | EA No: 21C0845


We provide solutions to all recruitment needs as well as HR services for a range of industries in Singapore. Our clients varying from well-known and established corporations to up-and-coming start-ups, put their trust in our services to provide the most efficient and effective results for recruitment and HR services. Supporting the exponential growth of our clients is and always will be what we strive for. 


We have a team of well-equipped recruiters who are dedicated to placing job seekers with the best-suited companies. We make sure our recruiters at Recruit Now are well-educated on employment laws, job market and skillsets needed for respective industries to ensure a meticulous selection process in recruitment and safe employment. 


Take your first step in finding your career.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT NOW SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
